name: Docket
description: Docket AI makes your sales knowledge your instant superpower.
longDescription: Docket AI makes your sales knowledge your instant superpower. Sales reps get accurate, on-demand answers to product, competitive, technical, and customer questions—pulled directly from your unified Sales Knowledge Lake™. Guided by verified company intel, reps handle objections confidently, uncover prospect details, and craft personalised responses on the spot.
